blocking_gaps: Current WORKER_INVOCATION_ARTIFACT_V1 uses chain_id while execution runtime requires canonical_chain_id.
Current WORKER_INVOCATION_ARTIFACT_V1 uses worker_dispatch_reference/worker_dispatch_hash while execution runtime requires dispatch_reference/dispatch_hash.
Current WORKER_INVOCATION_ARTIFACT_V1 uses worker_id while execution runtime requires worker_reference.
Current chain uses worker invocation request and execution packet lineage while execution runtime requires execution_request_reference.
Execution runtime requires request_type and capability_id fields that are not directly present on current worker invocation artifacts.
Execution runtime validates legacy dispatch artifacts, not current WORKER_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT_V1 directly.
Execution runtime expects a direct WORKER_INVOCATION_RETURNED replay artifact, not the current four-step invocation replay capture.
